title: "langsmith-trace"

<Badge text="langsmith-trace" variant="note" /> <Badge text="19 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Inspect first" variant="caution" /> <Badge text="inspect-then-install" variant="default" />

> LangSmith eval pipeline skills. Requires `LANGCHAIN_API_KEY` and LangSmith cloud access.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add langchain-ai/langsmith-skills --skill langsmith-evaluator --skill langsmith-dataset --skill langsmith-trace -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/langsmith-trace`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/langsmith-trace.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add langchain-ai/langsmith-skills --skill langsmith-evaluator --skill langsmith-dataset --skill langsmith-trace -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: LangSmith eval pipeline skills. Requires `LANGCHAIN_API_KEY` and LangSmith cloud access.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Official from langchain-ai/langsmith-skills (early dev, 131 stars). Query and export traces (helpers). Requires LANGSMITH_API_KEY + cloud access per README. Part of observability for LLM apps. Complements langchain-skills.

## Install Prerequisites

npx skills add langchain-ai/langsmith-skills --skill ... -y -g -a [..]; set LANGSMITH_API_KEY; status=inspect-then-install.

## Upstream Maintainer

[langchain-ai/langsmith-skills](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langsmith-skills)

## Comparable Alternatives

Other trace/eval skills (e.g. langfuse, phoenix).

&gt; Evidence from public web sources, GitHub (official orgs 2026), curated catalog; research evidence, not authority. External audit advised.
